description_long: This is a rectangular, vertically-oriented banner display with a rigid, flat surface. The front face features a printed advertisement for 'Portable 3D Scanning Solutions' by LaserDesign and Artec 3D, including several photographic images and text. The sides are extremely thin, indicating a lightweight construction, and the back appears to be a plain, dark surface with no visible graphics or mounting hardware. The banner is likely made from a combination of plastic or laminated cardboard for the main panel, providing both durability and a smooth surface for high-quality printing. The overall form is sleek and modern, suitable for professional or commercial environments. There are no visible interactive elements or support structures, suggesting it is designed to be freestanding or placed in a holder.
description: A vertically-oriented, rectangular banner with a printed advertisement for 3D scanning solutions, featuring a smooth, rigid surface and thin profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed advertisement with images and text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extremely thin profile of the banner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark surface with no graphics or visible mounting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the banner.
